# Version 3.116.1
> **Servicing fix** · Released December 5, 2024 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.116.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.116.1)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.116.1/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.0.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.116.1 corrects the NuGet PackagePath and updates the Android NDK to r27c with 16 KB alignment.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Platform

- **Android NDK r27c and 16 KB alignment** — Updates the Android NDK to r27c and switches to 16 KB page alignment for Android 15 compatibility. ([#3098](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3098))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0.1

Picks up the corrected NuGet PackagePath and the Android NDK r27c / 16 KB alignment update in the HarfBuzzSharp binding. ([#3102](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3102), [#3098](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3098))
